arts.ttl: Harry Kane: Bayern Munich injury latest ahead of crunch Celtic clash
arts.sum: Kane scored in the first-leg at Celtic Park last week

arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda presents Celtic stick or twist choice for Brendan Rodgers but one man is tailor made for Munich
arts.sum: Rodgers admits he's debated which front three combo of Maeda, Adam Idah, Nicolas Kuhn and Jota he should deploy

arts.ttl: “Fresh”, “mentally ready” Bayern Munich side set for Celtic match per Jamal Musiala
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala is sure that his squad is not going to look past Celtic FC after how close things were in Scotland last week. Musiala thinks that the team will learn from the experience.

arts.ttl: Pat Nevin shares how his BBC colleagues reacted to the Celtic Park noise vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Even during the Bhoys’ defeat to Bayern Munich, the Parkhead crowd created something special as the Champions League theme tune reverberated around Celtic Park . Pat Nevin said his BBC colleagues had ‘their chins on the desk’ at the Celtic fans’ Champions League noise

arts.ttl: Rodgers wants no regrets and urges Celtic bravery against Bayern
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers calls for his Celtic team to play without fear and have no regrets in the second leg of their Champions League play-off against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Man City & Celtic with work to do, but who needs what in Champions League play-offs?
arts.sum: Manchester City and Celtic are among the teams with work to do if they are to advance into the last 16 of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Who will win Bayern vs Celtic? Our writers deliver their predictions for Champions League showdown in Germany
arts.sum: The Hoops head for the Allianz Arena trailing 2-1 from the first leg at Parkhead last week

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala states what Bayern Munich have done ahead of Celtic game ‘isn’t normal’
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boost Bundesliga title hopes ahead of Celtic game Last season, for the first time in a decade, Xabi Alonso led Bayer Leverkusen to their first German title in their history and ended Bayern’s dominance, so you can understand the pressure to win it back this season.

arts.ttl: Rodgers urges Celtic to play ‘without fear’ despite Bayern’s Harry Kane boost
arts.sum: Celtic visit Munich on Tuesday facing one-goal deficit Kompany says Kane’s facial injury is ‘nothing bad’ No sooner had Celtic been afforded unlikely hope on the eve of the second leg of their Champions League playoff against Bayern Munich than their contingent in the Bavarian capital dismissed any notion of Harry Kane missing the match. Kane sat out Bayern’s training session on Monday as he recovered from the effects of a facial injury sustained during the weekend draw with Bayer Leverkusen. The Bayern manager, Vincent Kompany, said he would wait until Tuesday before deciding whether the England captain can line up against the Scottish champions. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Brazil legend Ronaldo tells Romario about an ex-Celtic star who 'was a really cool guy'
arts.sum: Making 26 appearances and scoring six goals, Gravesen won a league title at Celtic but it was during his time at Real Madrid that Ronaldo remembers the Danish midfielder as a ‘good guy’. But who would have thought that Brazilian superstar Ronaldo would be naming an ex-Hoops player as one that he remembers in the duration of his career as one who was a ‘really cool guy’.
